hero.badge: A leading CPA firm in Israel
hero.subtitle: Asor — Certified Public Accountants. Professionalism, transparency, and personal guidance that handles your business at every scale — from the wide view to the smallest detail.

activityAreas.title: End to end — at every scale
activityAreas.subtitle: Six core practice areas that keep your business healthy, organized, and ready for any decision.

audit.title: Audit & Financial Reporting
audit.description: Independent, professional audits for companies and nonprofits — aligned with the strictest local and international accounting standards.

bookkeeping.title: Bookkeeping & Payroll
bookkeeping.description: Ongoing, professional management of your books and payroll, with tight controls and transparent reporting at every step.

tax.title: Taxation & Tax Planning
tax.description: Smart tax planning, representation before tax authorities, and tax refund handling for both self-employed and salaried clients.

consulting.title: Business Consulting
consulting.description: Strategic guidance through every stage of business — from launch through growth, exit, and intergenerational transfer.

realestate.title: Real Estate & Urban Renewal
realestate.description: A unique specialty in evacuation-and-rebuild (Pinui-Binui), TAMA 38, and the taxation of real estate transactions.

nonprofits.title: Nonprofits & NGOs
nonprofits.description: Comprehensive support for nonprofits and public-benefit corporations, including proper-management certification and routine reporting.

about.title: About the firm
about.subtitle: Asor — Certified Public Accountants, founded on the belief that quality financial guidance is much more than tallying numbers at year-end.
about.p1: Our firm provides personal, professional, and comprehensive service, tailored precisely to each client's financial needs. We stand for reliability, transparency, and the pursuit of excellence — and we accompany our clients at every stage of business life.
about.p2: Our team combines deep professional knowledge with a personal, attentive approach. We believe that every client deserves direct access to a professional who knows their business deeply, and who can support strategic decisions — not just technical ones.
about.p3: Alongside our core CPA services — audit, bookkeeping, and taxation — we have developed a unique specialty in real estate, Pinui-Binui, and TAMA 38, an area that requires combined knowledge of accounting, taxation, and the complexities of the Israeli real estate world.
